hotel_name: Khách sạn Rova Phú Quốc (Rova Hotel Phú Quốc)

reviews.title: Money gone inside the room.
reviews.text:
We have disappointment and frustration with the service and staff at this hotel, and the doors have multiples issues to open.

 

On the second day, we went down for breakfast on the G floor. After 10 minutes, we returned to our room, but the door wouldn’t open again. We waited until breakfast was finished, yet no technician came. We told staff we would be back in 30 minutes after buying coffee. When we returned, we were given a physical key — the door was fixed, the room was cleaned, but money from our wallet in the room was missing. Reporting this took over two hours while staff checked CCTV, delaying our trip. Finally, we received no refund, no compensation, and no sympathy. This is a serious security issue and poor service — this should never happen at any hotel.
reviews.room_type: Ocean View Family Room for 4 Adults

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Very weird rules of hotels time of check out they check small small things  even towels if it’s dirty really I stay numbers of hotels but here very strange rule never advice to stay

reviews.title: Bad smell ( entire 4th floor)
reviews.text:
We stayed for 2 days on the 4th floor a week ago. The entire corridor area, room and bathroom smelled bad. 

Initially after we checked in our room, the smell was faint and we thought it was coming from the centralised AC. We even asked the  reception guy to get it checked before we went out. We came back at night and the reception guy was still in reception area( talking to someone). We took the lift to 4th floor and felt the same smell and after sometime our nose got accustomed to the bad smell and we forgot to mention it again. But on the 2nd day (night time) the smell got unbearable, we had to open the windows to get the smell out. It came from the bathroom. The wash basin is outside the bathroom which gets clogged without any reason. 

Overall bad plumbing work/maintenance work I must stay. Hopefully they clear the issue for new customers.

Also the fan and bathroom light is operated with same switch. So we couldn't switch off the bathroom light at night because we needed the fan to get the smell out of the room.

We only came to the room to sleep. So thankfully we didn't have to stay in the room for long. 😌

 Apart from that, the room had good kiss bridge view and looked clean. And is at walkable distance to the main sunset town area which is a plus

reviews.title: It's fine
reviews.text: The pros include a room with a city view, and even with the window open, you can still enjoy the fireworks. However, the bathroom has a slightly musty smell, and the red curtains let in a lot of light during the day. The room is fairly small at 20m², but it's fine for two people. The bed linens feel a bit itchy, and the bright red color is a bit overwhelming. The air conditioner doesn’t cool very well. Overall, considering the promotional price of about 400K VND, it’s acceptable

reviews.title: Not Suitable for Family
reviews.text: The room was very small and not spacious at all for a family stay. There was no proper space to put our luggage, which made the stay uncomfortable. Despite the listing, no cookware was provided, so it was inconvenient for preparing simple meals. Overall, it did not meet our expectations and was not family-friendly.
reviews.room_type: Ocean View Family Room for 4 Adults

reviews.title: Near the fireworks viewing point.
reviews.text: The room is somewhat decent for the price, but the connecting room door cannot be closed and needs to be reported for repair. The amenities are available but cannot be plugged in, such as the kettle, and there is no balcony, only a window with a sea view. It is not exactly as advertised, but it is convenient to walk and see the fireworks near tourist attractions, walking streets, and supermarkets.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Advantages: the hotel has a good location, has full amenities such as breakfast, lunch, sells convenience items, offers motorbike rentals, and has an ironing room.  
Disadvantages: there is no 24-hour reception. When checking in, the bed was dirty, with dust and hair from the previous guest. I requested a change in the morning but it was only changed by the afternoon.

reviews.title: Both the location and cost performance are great.
reviews.text: It's in a convenient location to move around Sunset Town. They clean every day very thoroughly, which is nice! I watched a lot of fireworks during my 7-night stay. Later, I got a bit lazy and didn’t go out anymore, haha. The morning glory stir-fry at the restaurant on the first floor had good value for money, so I ordered it several times.

reviews.title: The location is excellent.
reviews.text: A place I booked last minute based on its proximity to tourist attractions and walkability. Sunset Town seems to have all the accommodations packed tightly in alleys, except for major hotels like La Festa. The location was perfect as it was within walking distance to the cable car, Sunset Beach, and night market. The condition of the accommodation was just average. I booked two rooms of the same type, but it was funny that the items provided in each room were different (my room had a pot, but my parents' room did not). The water pressure was low and there were a lot of mosquitoes, which was a bit uncomfortable. I think it's okay as a budget-friendly place just for sleeping.

reviews.title: Room not sound proof
reviews.text:
1) Price - Very affordable. Bear in mind you get what you paid for.

2) Room - Pretty basic for bathing, getting ready and sleeping. It’s alright if you spend most of the time outside and just need the room for the aforementioned purposes.

3) Room not sound proof - PLEASE, COUPLES. If you wanna stay here, please do not be lovey dovey because we can hear everything. We can even hear your conversation in your normal voice. My sister and I whispered to each other throughout our stay to avoid from disturbing the people next door.

4) Amenities - You will get a small bottle of shampoo, body wash, dental kits, a soap bar and a very small shower cap suitable for kids. Better bring your own.

5) Towels - Hand, face and body towels including the one for the floor are provided and changed everyday. Do hang the sign outside your door for this to be done and also for your room to be made.

6) Cleanliness - Could be better. Staff did not really vacuum / sweep the floor properly especially under the vanity area.

 7) Staff - Nice and courteous.

8) Location - Walking distance to cable car which leads you to the waterpark, the Kissing Bridge. Night market, big supermarket along the beach behind the hotel.

reviews.title: Convenient location, good service.
reviews.text:
The communication before and after check-in was quick.  
The young male at the reception desk on the first floor was very nice.  
The location is very convenient; there is an option to eat rice noodle soup, Vietnamese black coffee, juice, etc., on the first floor at reasonable prices.  
Some basic daily necessities are available for sale.  
The refrigerator in the room is quite large.  
A simple kitchen is provided, but it’s a bit unfortunate that there are no cooking utensils.

reviews.title: It's quiet and peaceful, but there are intermittent loud signals in the room.
reviews.text: Inside the room, it is quiet, clean, and very suitable for relaxing. It's not far to walk to the sea and the night market, but there are intermittent loud sounds like "beep, beep" in the room. I'm not sure what the sound is. Personally, it doesn't bother me much; I'm just sharing my experience.

reviews.title: Rova hotel first experience
reviews.text:
-The hotel is in a convenient location, close to the beach, and the road leading here is very beautiful. It looks like a European city.
-The staff here are very friendly and lovely.
-The hotel has a canteen on the ground floor. Especially, the cook's food is very delicious; everything I tried was tasty, and the prices are very reasonable for a vacation. (50-60k per generous portion)
-The room rental price is also very good; it turns out to be cheap, and there are many convenient stores around.
-I forgot to take pictures in the room.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: A good choice for a vacation in PQ.
reviews.text: If the receptionist were a little more professional, there would be nothing to criticize. Overall, the family's vacation was quite successful in every aspect. Thank you for contributing to that success. The chef is truly wonderful; I recommend dining here throughout the vacation.

reviews.title: Good experience
reviews.text: I had a 2-night experience at Rova hotel. The hotel is very pretty, located right in the Mediterranean area, within walking distance to the sunset bridge and the beach to watch the fireworks every night. The room isn't too big but is decorated cozy, fully equipped, and clean. What I liked the most was that the room has a large refrigerator and kitchen so everyone can cook in the room. 👍

Highly recommend 🌟
Second time stay at Rova and it's still enjoyable stay, great location and hotel facilities, lovely staff there too 😊

reviews.title: I like it very much.
reviews.text: Located right in the middle of Sunset Town, there are nearby tourist attractions that can be reached on foot, so the accessibility is very good. The room is beautifully decorated in a Provence style that matches the town atmosphere, and some kitchen utensils are also provided. The view from the window was very lovely. I accidentally checked in incorrectly, but they kindly offered me some benefits, which warmed my heart, and I didn't want to leave, wishing to stay longer at this place. Above all, the cost performance is absolutely amazing. It's unimaginable to have such conditions for just under 40,000 won. Haha.

Only problem is the terrible music that the resort owners play endlessly in the streets but this can be fixed with ear plugs or get a room on the beach side of the building.

The property has a peaceful, relaxing atmosphere with no noise to speak of, and the staff were genuinely warm and attentive throughout. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Wonderful vacation at Nam Island Hotel Phu Quoc.
reviews.text:
I am very satisfied with my experience at this hotel in the southern part of the island. I was even upgraded to a room with a sea view, which made it feel even more special. The room is spacious, clean, well-equipped, and even has a kitchen, making it very convenient for a longer stay.

The thing I like most is the incredibly beautiful view, looking directly at the Kiss Bridge. From high up, you can see the fireworks and the Symphony show very clearly, without having to jostle for space while still fully enjoying the atmosphere. It only takes a few minutes' walk to get to the Kiss Bridge and the Kiss of the Sea performance area, so it's extremely convenient.

With a reasonable price compared to the location and the experience received, I find this place very worthy to stay when visiting the southern part of Phu Quoc Island.

reviews.title: Excellent location, fully equipped with a restaurant and motorcycle rental service.
reviews.text: The hotel is located in Sunset Town, a ten-minute walk from the town center. There is a restaurant downstairs, and the rice noodles and baguettes are delicious. They also sell instant noodles, chips, drinks, and some everyday necessities. Renting a motorcycle costs 170,000 Vietnamese Dong for a day, which is convenient at the hotel. However, if you dirty the bedding, there is a charge of 260,000 Vietnamese Dong. 😭😭

reviews.title: 11/10 compared to the price range.
reviews.text: Beautiful room with full amenities. The room is cleaned and everything is restocked each day when used up. The two receptionists are super adorable and provide enthusiastic support to guests. Check-in is at 2 PM, but I arrived an hour early on September 3rd and the receptionist checked and found available rooms, so they offered early check-in in a very subtle and polite manner.

reviews.title: Loved the Upgrade and Easy Walk to Night Market
reviews.text: The receptionist was very friendly and even upgraded me to a larger room with a sea view. The hotel is in a great location, within walking distance to the night market, fireworks, and other attractions. There’s also a small convenience store and restaurant right on the ground floor, which was very convenient. I’d definitely stay here again if I return to Phu Quoc.

reviews.title: The fireworks are visible.
reviews.text: The fireworks held at night can be seen well, and the elevator is functioning well. The hotel front is small and not great with English, but there’s a supermarket and restaurant below the hotel where you can buy simple food and drinks. There are outdoor tables in front of the hotel where smoking is allowed, which is a good environment for smokers. I recommend it as a spacious and clean accommodation for the price.

Stayed here for a short getaway and honestly, it was such a great experience. The staff were super friendly and helpful from the moment we arrived. The room was super clean, cozy, and had everything we needed.

The vibe of the hotel was chill and relaxing – perfect for a little break from the usual routine.
🛏️ Comfy bed, clean bathroom
📍 The location was really convenient – close to shops, restaurants, and attractions.

Definitely planning to come back. Highly recommend if you’re looking for a nice and comfy place to stay! 🌴

reviews.text: Nhân viên lễ tân nhiệt tình chu đáo. Dọn phòng sạch sẽ gọn gàng, lại còn phụ rửa bát. Vị trí gần quảng trường có thể đi bộ ra xem cầu hôn và pháo hoa. Nếu có dịp ghé PQ chắc chắn sẽ quay lại

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great location, complete facilities, cleanliness maintained. Highly recommended! 👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.title: overall
reviews.text: overall a great place to stay, friendly front desk, worth the money, nice area obviously and quite near to things as well .
reviews.room_type: Ocean View Family Room for 4 Adults

reviews.title: Room with fantastic view and basic cooking
reviews.text: Super value for money. Budget but you get all need and fireworks from windows twice a day. Have stove to some cooking. Room is studio type with separated zone for tv and bed make it very comfortable to stay long term.

reviews.title: Should stay
reviews.text: The room has a view of the street where you can see fireworks at night, it's clean, there are motorbikes for rent, and there is a grocery store and breakfast available downstairs.

reviews.title: Ok.
reviews.text: Walk distance to the sea of symphony. Can see the firework from the window (seaview) . Family room quite big, 2 room attached.  Please insert total pax of your family, or else they will charge for extra pax.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: We had a very pleasant stay at rova . We booked for 2 nights here. Kitchen facility was wonderful there. Sunset town is itself very beautiful. Love from Mumbai, India ❤️❤️

reviews.title: VACATION
reviews.text: OUTSTANDING HOTEL OVERALL EVERYTHING WAS G8

reviews.title: Absolutely amazing.
reviews.text: The hotel is very nice. My family has 2 small children, but we stayed very comfortably.

reviews.title: Best location
reviews.text: Clean and comfortable room

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Superb
reviews.text: Our stay at was absolutely delightful! The rooms were clean, spacious, and beautifully decorated, with incredibly comfortable bed. The staff were friendly, making us feel truly welcome. The hotel's location was perfect. We would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Owesome

reviews.title: Very Nice Hotel near to kiss bridge
reviews.text: Nice hotel, very near to kiss bridge and sunset town. Luggage facility available.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: Nice

reviews.title: Worth All Your Money
reviews.text:
Amazing stay here in Phu Quoc. I love the daily cleaning which is top tier. Stay for 4d3n and all I can say is worth it. 

They got few kitchen stuff like plates, fork and spoon and also bowl. For Muslim Traveller I suggest to bring your own just in case. Location wise quite okay , you can always book a buggy if you dont want to walk.  Room quite small compare to what you see in the photo but with the price, dont complaint much. 

Overall, worth the money 🙏🏻

reviews.title: The value-for-money accommodation is clear!
reviews.text: I focused on the location of the accommodation. The location was good and 100,000 won for two nights seems very reasonable. It felt like two motel rooms combined, with one living room and two bedrooms, all spacious and nice. However, for my next trip, I plan to stay at a hotel with a good breakfast. Some of the restaurants recommended by locals were quite overpriced, and the adjacent hotel had a view where you could watch a premium show from the accommodation. Considering the cost of the show seats and meals, it seems better to go to a nice hotel that includes breakfast and dinner.
reviews.room_type: Ocean View Family Room for 4 Adults

reviews.title: Nice and great
reviews.text: Can see fireworks from the window. Few metres to cable car station. Located near phu quoc night bazar. Easy to get halal food ftom sarah reataurant. The staff very helpful and they will make sure the room are clean and comfortable everyday. The towel smell so good. The room also have small kitchen, easy for prepare simple food.

reviews.title: Sunset Town Accommodation
reviews.text: The cost performance is good. It's centered around Kissedari, so you can see the fireworks from here. It's small but clean. There are many Korean restaurants when you go up the stairs. The location is great. The owner doesn't live on-site, so it lacks a personal touch, but the staff is friendly.

reviews.title: Good view
reviews.text: You can see the firework from the windows every night

reviews.title: The best hotel ever
reviews.text:
The best hotel ever.
Breakfast good but not halal. For those who looking no halal food with affordable price, please choose this place. Environmental ok, near to sunset town and cable car.  Room ok, spaces and very clean. Also got kitchen inside.. will here again for my next trip

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: good hotel with best location

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: very good with price 20-30 usd

reviews.title: Satisfied with the accommodation
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, the rooms are spacious and have a small kitchen, conveniently located for visiting the Mediterranean town, near the night market and the bridge of proposal.

reviews.title: Sea View Room
reviews.text: All staff very friendly and helpful although there was language barrier. They also provide motorcycle rental services. Perfect for muslim traveller as they provide kitchen for you to cook. Overall perfect !

reviews.title: amazing hospitality
reviews.text: group of 4 from 🇲🇾 they have functioning stove and pots, so we can cook our own meals. iron is provided just need to go to the first floor to iron, but we bring our own, so no hassle. good view even though not seaview, we got city view. the host informed us that it would be construction around the area but we didn’t mind the noise bcs we wouldn’t be at our room at day time. sleep peacefully at night tho. the housekeeper also very accommodative to our needs. please bring your own dish soap if you wish to use the utensils provided. since we are muslims, we brought sertu to cleanse everything. walking distance around sunset town and sunset town night market. very near to sunset town starbucks as well. 👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel, nice view, friendly support for guests, good prices.
reviews.text: The hotel is located in the center of the Sunset town. The view from the window looks straight at the Sunset bridge, it’s beautiful scenery. The hotel is comfortable, clean, and reasonably priced, with enthusiastic support for guests. I mistakenly booked the wrong room category, but I was quickly assisted in upgrading my room. The room I booked is a Suite sea view, which has a living room and a kitchen separate from the bedroom.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: LUV IT!

reviews.title: Comfortable and worth every penny
reviews.text: staff good, clean, decorative room n complete with kitchen, huge space for 2 person , connected room available for family of 4

reviews.title: The best accommodation in Sunset Town
reviews.text: I highly recommend this hotel if you're staying in Sunset Town. The staff are friendly, and the rooms are clean :))))

reviews.title: Very good hotel.
reviews.text:
The hotel is on a quiet street that is near to the main attractions. 
The rooms are very comfortable and clean, with nice soft beds and good air conditioning. 
The hotel has an elevator which is a good thing, as a lot of the other hotels don't.
The hotel is family run and the staff are very friendly and helpful. 
The food cooked in the cafe area is amazing and very reasonably priced. 
If you are coming to sunset town,  I don't think you would be disappointed with this accommodation. 
Thanks. 😃

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: Really nice room and surrounding. Wall is thin though you can hear people talking from other room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: would certainly be staying at the hotel again. They have a great staff.

reviews.title: Asia Venice
reviews.text: Beautiful design and nice hotel. The family room is huge with connecting room and hall, provides kitchenette but limited utensils, big fridge, cold aircond, iron/board, hair dryer, safety box, good water pressure, 2 tvs, comfortable pillow, mattress & room balcony. Recommended.

reviews.title: Recommended in Sunset Town
reviews.text: The hotel is strategic. Near the sunset beach, kiss bridge, and the vui fest night market. The room is big and clean. The staff is helpful.

reviews.title: All good
reviews.text:
The location is good, close to kiss bridge, kiss the sea show theatre, cable car station, & also sunset town night market.
The room is spacious & clean.
The staff are friendly & nice.
The room even has its own mini kitchen & big refrigerator.
So I love everything here.

reviews.title: Cute room!
reviews.text: A spacious and cute room! It was a long room formed by connecting two rooms. Everything from the windows, washbasin, toilet, shower, to the drainage was very very cute, and it was comfortable! You can also see fireworks from the window! Highly recommended!
reviews.room_type: Ocean View Family Room for 4 Adults

reviews.title: Handy for all things
reviews.text: Perfectly decent room and facilities close to all the sunset town has to offer

reviews.title: Just like Venice.
reviews.text: I heard that many Japanese people go to Ho Chi Minh City, but few go to Phu Quoc Island. Among them, the hotel in Sunset Town had a great location and was quite comfortable. The staff's service was also good.

reviews.title: BEAUTIFUL ROOM NEAR THE PROPOSAL BRIDGE
reviews.text: Beautiful room, close to the beach, proposal spot, night market, and An Thoi, very convenient transportation, friendly staff. If I come back again, I will still choose to stay here.

reviews.title: Highly recommended in the heart of sunset town
reviews.text: Fantastic hotel !!!!

reviews.title: Perfect stay in Sunset Town
reviews.text: The room is clean, super comfortable, water is hot, WiFi is good, location in town is great. Has everything you will need and the staff is helpful! One of our favorite hotels in Vietnam.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: My family and I stayed at Rova Hotel for 3 nights. The room was super clean, beautiful, and reasonably priced. It exceeded our expectations. 🥰 The hotel is very close to attractions in the town of Sunset. It takes just a 5-minute walk to get to the beach, where you can watch fireworks, the Proposal Bridge, or the night market. A wonderful vacation! 🥰🥰🥰

reviews.title: Absolutely amazing
reviews.text: A hotel near the beach, quiet, clean, suitable for relaxation, especially enjoyable to step out on the balcony in the early morning and watch the peaceful streets.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Everything just great

reviews.title: Cheap room, but big, beautiful, and clean.
reviews.text: The room is lovely, very spacious, and clean. It has amenities like soap, toothpaste, and a toothbrush provided. It's very worth the money. The staff is nice, attentive to service, and answers questions well. I'm impressed and will return if I have the chance.

reviews.title: Very nice place to stay!
reviews.text: I love stay here !! The place the view the vibe so ohsem

reviews.title: More than expected
reviews.text: I'm looking for a room for my cousin's family to go to Phu Quoc for a vacation. I found mostly rooms for 4 people with 2 double beds around, and the prices were quite high. Luckily, I found a hotel that really impressed me in the pictures because it's very affordable and also very convenient. The room is extremely spacious, has a small kitchen, a small area to eat together, and the design is cute, which is exactly my taste. The wardrobe is large, and especially the two beds are placed on either side like two separate rooms. So I highly recommend small families to book it if they want to travel in the An Thoi area.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: good

reviews.title: Trải nghiệm rất không tốt
reviews.text: Phòng bị hư máy lạnh phải chuyển từ sea view sang city view, khăn trong phòng tắm bị rách như hình. Buổi ăn sáng chỉ có đồ ăn, nước phải trả tiền riêng!

reviews.title: super hotel
reviews.text:
Super hôtel, le plus propre du vietnam jusqu’à présent. Eau chaude, chambre lavée tous les jours, draps propres, matelas très confo, louer scooter pour 150k/jour ou 75k/demi-jour. resto en bas offre petit déjeuner, prix raisonnable et café aussi! Personnel très gentil. 

Vous n’avez PAS accès à la plage depuis l’hôtel. Proche des gondoles, la ville est fantôme, tout est en construction. peu de touristes, pour l’instant. Ce n’est pas le vietnam du tout, ils ont essayer de recréer l’Europe, cependant si nous sommes au vietnam, ce n’est pas pour avoir l’impression d’être en Europe?! Vraiment drôle d’endroit. Bref pour l’hôtel, c’est un gros oui! Rien à dire !

reviews.title: C’était parfait 👌
reviews.text: Ma chambre nettoyer à tous les jours. Le staff qui donne un servi impeccable pour location de scooter, billet de spectacles etc…..la location est juste parfaite. Très silencieux car je ne comprends pas les autres avis qui dis le contraire? Wifi parfait 👌 je recommande et reviendrais à cet hôtel

reviews.title: Très bien
reviews.text: La porte entre les chambres c'est dommage notre voisin de chambre était très bruyant c'était pénible

reviews.title: Presque parfait
reviews.text: C'était vraiment super nous avons eu le droit a un surclassement ☀️🇻🇳 juste dommage qu'il y ai une porte qui correspond avec la chambre d'à côté.

reviews.title: Location is dead
reviews.text: The location in the suntown is okay but there is barely anything going on. Hotel is very clean and very affordable tho. For someone who wants to visit suntown def recommend

reviews.title: Bellissimo Hotel Nuovo Centro
reviews.text: Un posto molto bello e nuovo al centro di Sunset Town, consigliatissimo, la receptionist Lianh e' stata molto gentile, grazie per avermi corretto con la posizione del porto da raggiungere.

reviews.title: Everything was good except cleaning staff
reviews.text: Cleaning staff entered to my room while I was in a bathroom and naked. I don’t know why she did that but she shouldn’t have entered guest room without guest’s permission. She should have noticed that my key card was at its place and that means guest was in a room and shouldn’t bother my time. Such a bad experience for me  to be naked in front of stranger.

reviews.title: 位置优越的小酒店
reviews.text: 这家酒店位置。海景房间可以看到烟花表演和接吻桥，不过房间隔音不好，旁边房间的人讲话听得清清楚楚，睡眠不好的人注意，房间比较小，但装修的很好

reviews.title: Okay, good location
reviews.text: Beautiful room decorated but thin wall. One of male receptionist needs more training and experience thou. Keep good spirits to serve. Thanks 😊

reviews.title: 방음도 안되고..
reviews.text:
위치도 별로고 화장실에서 냄새도 심하고
0.5박만 묵어서 다행이지 숙박하기엔
방음도 너무 안되고 불꽃놀이 시간에는
건물이 흔들릴정도로 소음도크고
복도소음 옆방 앞방소음 리얼하게 다들려요. 
저녁몇시에 체크아웃 한다고 미리얘기를 해뒀는데도 리셉션 직원이 아무도 없어서 당황스러웠네요.

reviews.title: 푸꾸옥 여행 후기
reviews.text: 샤워기가 고장나서 제대로 고정이 안되는 것 빼고는 대체로 만족했습니다.

reviews.title: 가성비 좋은 숙소~
reviews.text: 가성비 좋은 숙소입니다. 선셋타운이나 키스더브릿지 가기 위치가 정말 좋습니다.

reviews.text: 말 할 필요가 없습니다. 접근성 좋고 직원들 친절하고 컨디션도 너무 좋습니다!

reviews.text:
방은 무료업그레이드 해줘서 편하게 지냈고 야시장. 케이블카.마트등등 가기에 위치가 좋아요
옆방이랑 방음이 잘 안되는게 있지만 가격대비 넘 좋은 숙소에요

내부는 개미 한마리 없이 깨끗.
뜨거운 물과 수압 잘나오고 에어컨 빵빵.

테이크아웃해서 보드카와 함께 Good!!

reviews.title: Cực kì tồi tệ khi không có bất kì ai đón tiếp chúng tôi
reviews.text: Tôi đặt booking last minutes vào lúc 23:18 phút tối ngày 12/07 với xác nhận từ phía Agoda và confirm về việc khách sạn đã nhận được thông tin của tôi, sau đó tôi không nhận được bất kì phản hồi nào về việc khách sạn không có lễ tân ca đêm hoặc hotline khi cần ( thậm chí là không liên hệ được sự giúp đỡ từ ai cả) tôi và người yêu đến khách sạn lúc 1h sáng và đoán xem !!! Không thể gọi được cho quản lý khách sạn, không lễ tân, và cửa thì bị khoá!!! Chúng tôi thậm chí không phải người dân ở đó, 1h sáng và bạn phải lang thang khắp nơi vì không có chỗ lưu trú trong khi bạn đã đặt trước :)))), nếu không nhận được những booking muộn xin đừng mở ứng dụng trên Agoda, tôi thấy đây là 1 sự lừa đảo trắng trợn!!!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Quá tệ

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Cực kỳ ồn. Nằm trong phòng mà đến cả người đi dép bên ngoài hành lang cũng nghe thấy tiếng

reviews.room_type: Ocean View Family Room for 4 Adults

reviews.title: Dịch vụ
reviews.text: Thứ nhất là về gối thì cái gối nó quá cứng và nó nhỏ trong khi còn ở trong thì quá nhiều nên nó cứng khi ngủ sáng dậy cái đầu nó bị ê tôi là không nằm gối luôn mà nó không nằm gối thì nó quá thấp cũng khó ngủ khách sạn nên trang bị cái loại vỏ gội rộng hơn một tí với cái lượng gòm đó thì nằm nó sẽ êm hơn điều thứ hai nữa là wi-fi rất kém không sử dụng được luôn

reviews.title: Bình thường
reviews.text:
Ưu điểm: 
Vị trí gần chỗ xem show Nụ hôn của biển cả, bắn pháo hoa, đi bộ tầm 5 phút, thuận tiện để di chuyển đến các điểm tham quan của Khu Địa Trung Hải

Nhược điểm: 
Nhà vệ sinh phòng 203 mùi ống cống bốc lên nồng nặc, vừa mùi thuốc lá còn thêm mùi tanh kinh khủng.
reviews.room_type: Ocean View Family Room for 4 Adults

reviews.title: Tạm được
reviews.text: Phòng không có dụng cụ nấu và ăn như hình, phải đi mượn.

reviews.title: Tạm ổn
reviews.text:
Vị trí thuận tiện tham quan khu Địa Trung Hải, tuy nhiên:
- Lễ tân sẽ ngừng làm việc sau 22h
- Thanh toán bằng thẻ phụ thu thêm 2%
- Vệ sinh phòng chỉ ở mức tương đối, phòng vệ sinh bốc mùi khó chịu.
reviews.room_type: Ocean View Family Room for 4 Adults

reviews.title: ổn
reviews.text: phòng hơi nhỏ...

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Trang thiết bị phòng ve sinh chưa dc tốt lắm
reviews.room_type: Ocean View Family Room for 4 Adults

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: tốt đẹp tốt đẹp giá cả tuyệt vời chúng tôi không đòi hỏi nhiều vị trí khách sạn khá tốt cho vị trí chuyển

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Khách sạn nằm trong khu Địa Trung Hải. Có thể đi bộ ra cầu Hôn, trạm cáp treo. Mình đặt 2 phòng đơn có cửa liên kết giữa 2 phòng, thuận tiện cho gia đình sinh hoạt. Tuy nhiên, thiết kế và bố trí nội thất mang lại cảm giác phòng khá chật và không thoáng đãng lắm.

reviews.title: Ổn trừ vấn đề cách âm giữa các phòng.
reviews.text: Mọi thứ rất ok nhưng Phòng cách âm không tốt. Phòng bên cạnh làm rơi đồ mà bên này cũng nghe.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Phòng ok, mình rất thích, nhưng có muỗi

reviews.title: SẼ CHỌN LẠI
reviews.text: Phòng hơi nhỏ nhưng sạch sẽ. Nhân viên nhiệt tình

reviews.title: Du lịch nhóm
reviews.text: Khách sạn rẻ nhất trong quần thể. Mọi thứ đầy đủ, nếu thêm tiện ích dịch vụ giặt là. Chúng tôi có thể tiết kiệm bằng việc mua đồ về nấu.

reviews.title: Điều kiện tốt để ở An Thới
reviews.text: Đây là địa điểm trung tâm của khu địa Trung Hải An Thới, tôi đặt phòng cao cấp nhất và ở chỗ đó có view biển nhìn thấy cầu hoàng hôn cũng như có thể ngắm pháo hoa.

reviews.title: ok nha
reviews.text: phòng sạch sẽ dc vệ sinh mỗi ngày

reviews.title: Du lịch
reviews.text: Vị trí thuận tiện nằm trong khu Địa trung hải

reviews.title: Đáng giá
reviews.text: Giá phòng tương đối tốt so với các ks xung quanh

reviews.title: Hài Lòng
reviews.text:
- Nhân viên nhiệt tình
- Phòng sạch sẽ
-  Vị trí thuận lợi, tiện nghi

reviews.title: Khách sạn tiện di chuyển trong khu thị trấn Hoàng Hôn
reviews.text: Vị trí của khách sạn trong thị trấn Hoàng Hôn rất thuận tiện để đi chơi, đi dạo, xem show trong thị trấn Hoàng Hôn.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng hơi nhỏ, bù lại nằm trong sunset town nên đi dạo chơi tiện, chủ khách sạn nhiệt tình

reviews.title: Chỗ ở rất hời so với tầm giá
reviews.text: Nhân viên chuyên nghiệp, phòng rộng và sạch sẽ. Phòng view biển coi ké đuợc show shyphony. Nói chung là ok nha

reviews.title: ok so với tầm giá
reviews.text: khách sạn ngay khu trung tâm địa trung hải tiện đi lại checkin. có cho thuê xe. có hàng tạp hoad và ăn sáng bên dưới giá phải chăng ở khu này. phòng điểm trừ là cách âm kém thôi. nói chung ok

reviews.title: Khách sạn gọn gàng rẻ đẹp
reviews.text: Tuyệt vời. 9,5 điểm!

Phòng sạch sẽ, tiện nghi, ngắm hoàng hôn rất OK.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng có 1 căn bếp thuận tiện cho mình muốn nấu ăn với gia đình, nhưng phải chuẩn bị thêm gia vị, vì khách sạn không cung cấp, phòng rộng, sạch sẽ, mình sẽ quay lại.
